Charlotte's Trusted Tree Care Experts

Horizon Tree Service keeps your property safe and beautiful. Serving Huntersville to Gastonia with local expertise since 2012.

What We Do

Our Services

Tree Removal

Storm Damage Cleanup

Professional Tree Pruning
SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Rooted in Charlotte

Founded in 2012, Horizon Tree Service grew from a single truck operation to Charlotte's most reliable tree care team. We've cared for everything from Myers Park's historic oaks to Ballantyne's new construction landscapes.

Our approach blends technical precision with environmental awareness. We understand how red clay soil affects root systems and how Carolina storms impact tree health.

When not trimming branches, our crew volunteers with Charlotte's tree canopy initiative and teaches pruning workshops at Freedom Park.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Horizon Tree Service

Local Knowledge

We know which species thrive in Charlotte's climate and how to protect your foundation from invasive roots.

Storm Ready

Our team is trained to handle ice storm damage and hurricane prep for your property.

Neighborhood Specialists

From Dilworth's mature magnolias to NoDa's compact lots, we adapt to each area's unique needs.

Clay Soil Experts

We've mastered techniques for planting and maintaining trees in Charlotte's challenging red clay.

Need Emergency Tree Service?

Our 24/7 storm response team can be at your Charlotte-area property within 2 hours.

Get a Free Estimate Call 555-tre-r90

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Horizon had my South End property cleared of fallen branches within 3 hours of last April's hailstorm. Their crew even noticed some cracked limbs that hadn't fallen yet and secured them before they could damage my roof. Professional from start to finish.

Marcus T. Storm Damage Cleanup
“

The team did an amazing job pruning our mature magnolias in Myers Park. They understood exactly how much to trim to maintain the trees' shape while improving airflow. Cleaner job than any other service we've used in 20 years.

Eleanor W. Tree Pruning
“

Had 4 large oak stumps ground down in my Huntersville backyard. They left the area perfectly level and even recommended some soil amendments for the clay before we sodded. No mess left behind - would definitely hire again.

Derrick S. Stump Grinding
“

Removed a dangerous leaning pine near our Concord home with impressive precision. The crane operator dropped every piece exactly where planned - didn't touch a single shrub. Their insurance documentation helped our claim process go smoothly.

Lisa M. Tree Removal
“

Planted 3 red maples along our Fort Mill property line last fall. Horizon's team amended the clay soil properly and staked them securely. All three came through their first Carolina summer beautifully with their recommended watering schedule.

Carlos R. Tree Planting
“

When an ice storm split our willow oak in Dilworth, Horizon responded at 2 AM to remove the section threatening our power line. Their 24/7 dispatcher kept us updated throughout, and the daytime crew returned to finish the job safely once temperatures rose.

Janet K. Emergency Tree Services

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you protect my lawn during removal?
We use specialized mats to prevent damage to Charlotte's delicate clay soils and grade the area post-removal to prevent erosion.
Can you remove trees near power lines?
Our certified arborists coordinate with Duke Energy when working near utilities in Huntersville and Matthews.
